titleStmt.title: SII 10.304: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 304. (A.R. No. 245 of 1905.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE DARK ROOM (CHĪKAṬI-MIDDI) IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1167. (Viśvāvasu)

summary.p: States that Kākatīya Gaṇapatidēva's agent Pōchana-Peggaḍa-Gaṇapaya remitted customs duties payable on three hundred pack bullocks used in importing goods into the town of Tripurāntakam which belongs to god Tripurāntaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśubhaśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1177 Agunēṁṭi
viśvāvasusaṁvatsara pavuṣyaśuddha maṁgaḷavāraṁ
makarasaṁkrāṁttinimittamuna śrītripurāṁttaka śrīma
hādēvaraku Aṁgaraṁgabhōgālaku naḍaceḍi puramu
tripurāṁttakamulōpali kāṁpulu Evvarainānuṁ peṟugā
ḍaṁmīṁda Ēmi peṟigi teccikonnānu kākatiyyagaṇapatidē
vamahārājulaku dha¨rmmamugā śrīmatu sa¨rvvādhikā
ri pōcenapreggaḍa gaṇapaya munnūṟu 300 peṟuka Eḍla
ku Ācaṁdrā¨rkamu Ella kālamuṁ sukamu manniṁcci dhārāpū
¨rvvakamu sēsi śāsanamu veṭṭi dha¨rmmamu pratipāliṁcce Itripurāṁtta
kamu peṟukayeḍlaku suṁkamu peṭṭamani Evva raḍiginā
Aḍiginavāra tamapeddakoḍuku kapālamunaṁ guḍicina
pāpānaṁ baḍuvāru .
Note:—The figure 1177 In the first line is evidently a mistake for 1163•
Digital edition of SII 10.304 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
